title: Arabian Nights: The Adventures of Sinbad
actors: Hideo Kinoshita, Tetsuko Kuroyanagi, Kyôko Satomi
plot: A young sailor named Sinbad and his sidekick Ali find a map to a fabulous treasure and stow away aboard a ship in an effort to get to where the treasure is buried. They eventually convince the ship's captain to change course and h...
